ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxonomy_elements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomy element */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Prefix of the taxonomy element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomy element */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the taxonomy element (e.g., xbrli:monetaryItemType) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Balance type of the taxonomy element (e.g., credit, debit) */,
  "periodType" TEXT /* Period type of the taxonomy element (e.g., instant, duration) */,
  "abstract" INTEGER /* Whether the taxonomy element is abstract */,
  "deprecatedLabel" TEXT /* Deprecated label for the taxonomy element */,
  "deprecatedDate" TEXT /* Date the taxonomy element was deprecated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the taxonomy element */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxonomy element became effective */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the taxonomy element is applicable */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Financial standard to which the taxonomy element belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the taxonomy element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the taxonomy element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy_labels" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomy element the label belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the taxonomy element */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation for the label */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the label */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_labels_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES taxonomy_elements ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial statement belongs to */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial statement (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the financial statement */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Financial standard to which the financial statement adheres */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial statement is reported */,
  "audited" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the financial statement has been audited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company operates */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the company's fiscal year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy_element_relationships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomy element */,
  "related_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related taxonomy element */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_element_relationships_related_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_element_id") REFERENCES taxonomy_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_element_relationships_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES taxonomy_elements ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the data point belongs to */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomy element the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the financial data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial data is reported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES taxonomy_elements ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, accountant) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
